title: Doc Guide on the Side to break up a Document
excerpt: Doc Guide on the Side to break up a Document similar to Google Docs that way we are not endlessly scrolling. Essentially headers would be the “guide” and it would pop up on the left side of the screen.

posts.author: dpforeman (Danielle)
posts.cookedHtml: Doc Guide on the Side to break up a Document similar to Google Docs that way we are not endlessly scrolling. Essentially headers would be the “guide” and it would pop up on the left side of the screen.
